# compare_strategy_evaluation_backends.py

<!-- Generated by scripts/docs/generate_api_docs.py. Do not edit manually. -->

## Purpose

Compare strategy evaluation backends via unified evaluator dispatcher.

## CLI usage

```bash
python scripts/validate/compare_strategy_evaluation_backends.py --help
```

## CLI options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Choices | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| --exact-tolerance | float | 1e-12 | False |  | Maximum allowed absolute difference for exact comparisons. |
| --json-output | Path | None | False |  | Optional path to write JSON report. |
| --mc-tolerance | float | 0.03 | False |  | Maximum allowed absolute difference for MC comparisons. |
| --n-eval-samples | int | 20000 | False |  | MC evaluation samples for dense_mc/procedural_mc. |
| --n-train-samples | int | 10000 | False |  | MC training samples for dense_mc/procedural_mc. |
| --p-rules | float | 0.5 0.8 1.0 | False |  | Rule probabilities to evaluate (default: 0.5 0.8 1.0). |
| --quiet | flag | False | False |  | Reduce console output. |
| --seed | int | 123 | False |  | Random seed for MC evaluators. |
| --spec-set | str | tiny | False | tiny | Named canonical spec set to validate. |
